## Primetime Inclusion

Primetime Mode is included as a bounded strategic mode contract.

It can activate, deactivate, shape response posture, and produce a human-review negotiation packet.

It cannot send messages, execute negotiation, threaten, coerce, deceive, sign, pay, or claim legal authority.

## ARMANIS Integration

NEIL Pass 1 can consume an ARMANIS Deal Answer reference and carry:

- readiness status
- certification level
- compatibility score
- readiness conditions
- decision summary

## LawAidAI / Law AI Negotiation Inclusion

NEIL Pass 1 supports LAWAI_NEGOTIATION context as a bounded negotiation preparation path.

It clarifies authority, delays until documentation, requires human review, and does not provide legal authority.

## Final Rule

NEIL Pass 1 creates the negotiation intelligence layer.

It does not create the live negotiation agent.

ARMANIS certifies readiness.
NEIL prepares negotiation posture.
Human remains final authority.
